steps.title: Evaluate f at x equals 0
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 0$ into the function $f(x) = a(5)^x$:
$$f(0) = a(5)^0 = a \cdot 1 = a$$
So the function value at $x = 0$ is the constant $a$.

steps.title: Use the point on the graph to find f(0)
steps.content: The graph passes through $(0, 14)$, meaning when $x = 0$, the value is $y = 14$. Since $y = f(x)$, we have: $$f(0) = 14$$ That matches Choice C — 14.
